# Projection Contract (Generated)

Contract: `PROJECTION-CONTRACT-001`
Domain: `projection`
Version: `2026-04-21`

Rules: 8

| Rule ID | Level | Title | Statement |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| R-PROJ-001 | must | projection-derived-not-truth | Projection is derived from canonical truth and explicit allowed state visibility; projection output is not truth by default and cannot masquerade as a truth write. |
| R-PROJ-002 | must | projection-consumes-explicit-inputs | Authoritative projection consumes explicit projection inputs anchored to truth, permitted state visibility, and governing release/truth anchors; consumers must not reconstruct canonical inputs from lorebook text, browse summaries, or app-local caches. |
| R-PROJ-003 | must | projection-request-explicit-and-replayable | Authoritative projection requests must explicitly identify world scope, agent scope, consumer surface, governing release/truth anchor, and constrained context envelope. |
| R-PROJ-004 | must | projection-deterministic-for-identical-inputs | For identical inputs, consumer surface, release/truth anchor, and constrained context envelope, authoritative projection must be deterministic and checksumable. |
| R-PROJ-005 | must | consumers-must-not-bypass-projection | Runtime and app consumers must not bypass authoritative projection by directly assembling truth text into prompt payloads; PromptTrace may consume projection output but does not replace the projection contract. |
| R-PROJ-006 | must | compat-surfaces-are-projection-only | Worldview, lorebooks, public browse aggregates, and future card-shaped exports are projection surfaces only and must not become the canonical semantic source. |
| R-PROJ-007 | must | projection-results-require-trace | Authoritative projection must produce traceable results that identify selected inputs, suppressed inputs, governing release/truth anchor, and resolution outcomes. |
| R-PROJ-008 | must | realm-projection-contract-owns-seam-until-runtime-mounted | Until a dedicated runtime-mounted projection spec is admitted, Realm projection authority owns the semantic contract for ProjectionInput, ProjectionRequest, ProjectionResult, and ProjectionTraceRequirement; downstream runtime or app implementations must not fork or narrow these semantics ad hoc. |

Entities: 4

| Entity | Prisma Model | Required Fields | JSON Fields |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| ProjectionInput |  | sourceType, sourceRef, governingTruthRef, surfaceEligibility |  |
| ProjectionRequest |  | worldId, agentId, consumerSurface, releaseAnchor, contextEnvelope |  |
| ProjectionResult |  | consumerSurface, checksum, selectedInputRefs, suppressedInputRefs, resolutionSummary |  |
| ProjectionTraceRequirement |  | selectedInputRefs, suppressedInputRefs, governingAnchor, resolutionOutcomes, checksum |  |

Required operations: 0

Secondary operations: 3
- GET /api/world/by-id/{id}/worldview
- GET /api/world/by-id/{id}/lorebooks
- GET /api/world/by-id/{id}/detail-with-agents
